## Description
<!-- Provide a brief summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. -->
- Fixes # (issue number)
- Summary of changes:

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Dependency update (Spring Boot version, library updates)

## Spring Boot Specifics
- [ ] New APIs documented via OpenAPI/Swagger?
- [ ] Database migrations included (e.g., Flyway/Liquibase)?
- [ ] Environment variables updated in `application.yml`?

## Testing & Quality
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (JUnit 5/Mockito)?
- [ ] Integration tests passed (Testcontainers/MockMvc)?
- [ ] JaCoCo code coverage meets minimum threshold?
- [ ] Checkstyle/Static analysis passed?
